name: the live wrapper resolves umbrella-matched sources and acquires a technology's rules from the fetch cache
command: ID=L561A01; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/acquire-technology-live.sh" --technology Vue --project $ID --cache fc --now 2026-07-05T00:00:00Z 2>e.err; grep -qE 'sources_matched=[1-9].* acquired_total=[1-9]' e.err; K=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --project $ID --format json 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'puts JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["rules"].select{|x|x["origin"]=="project"}.length'); rm -rf "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards"/_project/$ID; [ "$K" -ge 1 ] && echo live-acquires-from-cache 1>&2
setup: mkdir -p fc && printf '%s\n' 'Type Vue props explicitly.' 'Prefer plain TypeScript functions for Vue composables.' 'A line with no framework mention.' > fc/typescript-handbook.txt
